text.title: Active Listening Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure: scope the session → generate RASA script → review for assumptions → post-pass annotate transcript.

step.name: scope-the-session
step.input: Session goal + interviewee profile + channel (live-voice / live-video / async-text)
step.action: Capture one-sentence goal and 1-paragraph interviewee context. Decide stakes (low / medium / high). High stakes → require Level 5 prompt in the script.
step.decision-gate: If channel == async-text, replace silence_cue with explicit "Is there anything you'd like to add?" prompt.

step.name: generate-rasa-script
step.action: Run the prompt template via sonnet. Output must include receive_opener, ≥2 appreciate_phrases, ≥3 summarize_starters, ≥5 ask_questions (all open), ≥1 reflective_prompts, silence_cue.

step.name: review-for-assumptions
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-active-listening.py --file script.json`. Manually scan each ask_question for embedded assumptions ("What problems did X cause" → reformat). Re-run validator.
step.decision-gate: If validator returns violations, regenerate the failing fields and re-run.

step.name: annotate-transcript
step.action: Run annotation prompt via haiku. Apply `templates/speaker-ratio.py` to flag windows where interviewer word-share > 20%. Flag missing Summarize labels.
step.output: Annotated transcript with RASA labels + dominance flags + skipped-step list
